# and use it instead of the built-in WORKFLOW_CONFIG.

resource: or re-sequence rows. The engine reads rows

activity: # activity        : short name shown in audit output and the Workflow tab
#                     Wireline | Frac fleet | CT / cleanout | Milling | Testing unit
#                   To add a new resource type
# duration_source : where the duration comes from:
#                     param:<name>    look up in assumptions CSV by variable name
#                     formula:<expr>  evaluated per-well (see formula notes below)
#                     temp_log        only for wells with temperature log stages
#                     is_zipper       only in zipper frac mode
# path_type       : sequential = adds to resource workload (extends schedule)
#                   parallel   = absorbed into available time (does not extend
#   n_stages                 final stage count (after risk adjustments)
#   flowback_days            sampled from flowback min/max range (days)
# EXAMPLE: replacing CT cleanout with a rig-based cleanup
# Change the resource column from "CT / cleanout" to "Rig" and add "Rig"
# Copy and modify as needed for your operation.

notes: CT scraper run to clean wellbore before completions
Cement evaluation log via CT; skipped if SCMT is run offline
Set isolation plug before next perforation run
Optional temperature survey (only for selected stages)
Drill out all isolation plugs after frac completion
Post-frac flowback and pressure build-up well test
